nodes.label: Wayvue Landing Page Video - cinematic road trip hero footage showing a dark green rugged off-road SUV (with rear-mounted spare tire and an orange kayak on the roof rack) driving away from camera along a curving mountain highway at golden-hour, framed by pine forests and hazy silhouetted mountain peaks
